info.title: Reducto API
info.description: Reducto document parsing and extraction API exposed through PaySponge with x402 payments.

input.title: Input
input.description:
For parse/split/extract pipelines, the URL of the document to be processed. You can provide one of the following:
            1. A publicly available URL
            2. A presigned S3 URL
            3. A reducto:// prefixed URL obtained from the /upload endpoint after directly uploading a document
            4. A jobid:// prefixed URL obtained from a previous /parse invocation
            5. A list of URLs (for multi-document pipelines, V3 API only)

            For edit pipelines, this should be a string containing the edit instructions

parsing.description: The configuration options for parsing the document. If you are passing in a jobid:// URL for the file, then this configuration will be ignored.

instructions.description: The instructions to use for the extraction.

settings.description: The settings to use for the extraction.

async.description: The configuration options for asynchronous processing (default synchronous).

input.description:
For parse/split/extract pipelines, the URL of the document to be processed. You can provide one of the following:
            1. A publicly available URL
            2. A presigned S3 URL
            3. A reducto:// prefixed URL obtained from the /upload endpoint after directly uploading a document
            4. A jobid:// prefixed URL obtained from a previous /parse invocation
            5. A list of URLs (for multi-document pipelines, V3 API only)

            For edit pipelines, this should be a string containing the edit instructions

parsing.description: The configuration options for parsing the document. If you are passing in a jobid:// URL for the file, then this configuration will be ignored.

instructions.description: The instructions to use for the extraction.

settings.description: The settings to use for the extraction.

studio_link.title: Studio Link
studio_link.description: The link to the studio pipeline for the document.

result.title: Result
result.description: The extracted response in your provided schema. This is a list of dictionaries. If disable_chunking is True (default), then it will be a list of length one.

input.title: Input
input.description:
For parse/split/extract pipelines, the URL of the document to be processed. You can provide one of the following:
            1. A publicly available URL
            2. A presigned S3 URL
            3. A reducto:// prefixed URL obtained from the /upload endpoint after directly uploading a document
            4. A jobid:// prefixed URL obtained from a previous /parse invocation
            5. A list of URLs (for multi-document pipelines, V3 API only)

            For edit pipelines, this should be a string containing the edit instructions

async.description: The configuration options for asynchronous processing (default synchronous).

input.title: Input
input.description:
For parse/split/extract pipelines, the URL of the document to be processed. You can provide one of the following:
            1. A publicly available URL
            2. A presigned S3 URL
            3. A reducto:// prefixed URL obtained from the /upload endpoint after directly uploading a document
            4. A jobid:// prefixed URL obtained from a previous /parse invocation
            5. A list of URLs (for multi-document pipelines, V3 API only)

            For edit pipelines, this should be a string containing the edit instructions

queue_priority.description: Queue priority. 'batch' for non-urgent work that processes when spare GPU capacity is available.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The duration of the parse request in seconds.

pdf_url.title: Pdf Url
pdf_url.description: The storage URL of the converted PDF file.

studio_link.title: Studio Link
studio_link.description: The link to the studio pipeline for the document.

result.title: Result
result.description: The response from the document processing service. Note that there can be two types of responses, Full Result and URL Result. This is due to limitations on the max return size on HTTPS. If the response is too large, it will be returned as a presigned URL in the URL response. You should handle this in your application.

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: The JSON schema to use for the extraction.

system_prompt.title: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: The system prompt to use for the extraction.

include_images.title: Include Images
include_images.description: If True, include images in the extraction.

optimize_for_latency.title: Optimize For Latency
optimize_for_latency.description: If True, jobs will be processed with a higher throughput and priority at a higher cost. Defaults to False.

deep_extract.title: Deep Extract
deep_extract.description: If True, use Deep Extract, an agentic extraction mode that iteratively refines its output to achieve near-perfect accuracy. Best for complex documents where accuracy is critical.

citations.description: The citations to use for the extraction.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: JSON metadata included in webhook request body. Defaults to None.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: If True, attempts to process the job with priority if the user has priority processing budget available; by default, sync jobs are prioritized above async jobs.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.description: The webhook configuration for the asynchronous processing.

agentic.title: Agentic
agentic.description: Agentic uses vision language models to enhance the accuracy of the output of different types of extraction. This will incur a cost and latency increase.

summarize_figures.title: Summarize Figures
summarize_figures.description: If True, summarize figures using a small vision language model. Defaults to True.

intelligent_ordering.title: Intelligent Ordering
intelligent_ordering.description: If True, use an advanced vision language model to improve reading order accuracy, with a small increase in latency. Defaults to False.

filter_blocks.title: Filter Blocks
filter_blocks.description: A list of block types to filter out from 'content' and 'embed' fields. By default, no blocks are filtered.

embedding_optimized.title: Embedding Optimized
embedding_optimized.description: If True, use embedding optimized mode. Defaults to False.

add_page_markers.title: Add Page Markers
add_page_markers.description: If True, add page markers to the output. Defaults to False. Useful for extracting data with page specific information.

table_output_format.title: Table Output Format
table_output_format.description: The mode to use for table output. Defaults to dynamic, which returns md for simpler tables and html for more complex tables.

merge_tables.title: Merge Tables
merge_tables.description: A flag to indicate if consecutive tables with the same number of columns should be merged. Defaults to False.

include.title: Include
include.description: A list of formatting to include in the output.

include.title: Include
include.description: Whether to include cell color, formula, and dropdown information in the output.

clustering.title: Clustering
clustering.description: In a spreadsheet with different tables inside, we enable splitting up the tables by default. Accurate mode applies more powerful models for superior accuracy, at 5× the default per-cell rate. Disabling will register as one large table.

exclude.title: Exclude
exclude.description: Whether to exclude hidden sheets, rows, or columns in the output.

ocr_system.title: Ocr System
ocr_system.description: Standard is our best multilingual OCR system. Legacy only supports germanic languages and is available for backwards compatibility.

extraction_mode.title: Extraction Mode
extraction_mode.description: The mode to use for text extraction from PDFs. OCR mode uses optical character recognition only. Hybrid mode combines OCR with embedded PDF text for best accuracy (default).

force_url_result.title: Force Url Result
force_url_result.description: Force the result to be returned in URL form.

force_file_extension.title: Force File Extension
force_file_extension.description: Force the URL to be downloaded as a specific file extension (e.g. `.png`).

return_ocr_data.title: Return Ocr Data
return_ocr_data.description: If True, return OCR data in the result. Defaults to False.

return_images.title: Return Images
return_images.description: Whether to return images for the specified block types. 'page' returns full page images. By default, no images are returned.

embed_pdf_metadata.title: Embed Pdf Metadata
embed_pdf_metadata.description: If True, embed OCR metadata into the returned PDF. Defaults to False.

persist_results.title: Persist Results
persist_results.description: If True, persist the results indefinitely. Defaults to False.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: The timeout for the job in seconds.

page_range.title: Page Range
page_range.description: The page range to process (1-indexed). By default, the entire document is processed. For spreadsheets, you can also provide a list of sheet names.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: If True, include citations in the extraction.

numerical_confidence.title: Numerical Confidence
numerical_confidence.description: If True, enable numeric citation confidence scores. Defaults to True.

QueuePriority.title: QueuePriority
QueuePriority.description: Customer-facing queue priority for parse jobs.

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: A list of Svix channels the message will be delivered down, omit to send to all channels.

advanced_chart_agent.title: Advanced Chart Agent
advanced_chart_agent.description: If True, use the advanced chart agent. Defaults to False.

return_overlays.title: Return Overlays
return_overlays.description: If True, return overlays for the figure. This is so you can use the overlays to double check the quality of the extraction

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Custom instructions for agentic text. Note: This only applies to form regions (key-value).

chunk_mode.title: Chunk Mode
chunk_mode.description: Choose how to partition chunks. Variable mode chunks by character length and visual context. Section mode chunks by section headers. Page mode chunks according to pages. Page sections mode chunks first by page, then by sections within each page. Disabled returns one single chunk.

chunk_size.title: Chunk Size
chunk_size.description: The approximate size of chunks (in characters) that the document will be split into. Defaults to null, in which case the chunk size is variable between 250 - 1500 characters.

chunk_overlap.title: Chunk Overlap
chunk_overlap.description: Number of characters of overlap to include from adjacent chunks. Defaults to 0.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: If True, split large tables into smaller tables. Defaults to True.

size.title: Size
size.description: The size of the tables to split into. Defaults to 50. Use 'row' and 'column' to independently specify the number of rows and columns to include when splitting. If you only want to split by rows or columns, set the other value to None.

start.title: Start
start.description: The page number to start processing from (1-indexed).

end.title: End
end.description: The page number to stop processing at (1-indexed).

row.title: Row
row.description: The number of rows to include in each chunk when splitting large tables. Does not chunk rows if set to None.

column.title: Column
column.description: The number of columns to include in each chunk when splitting large tables. Does not chunk columns if set to None.

content.title: Content
content.description: The content of the chunk extracted from the document.

embed.title: Embed
embed.description: Chunk content optimized for embedding and retrieval.

enriched.title: Enriched
enriched.description: The enriched content of the chunk extracted from the document.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of block extracted from the document.

bbox.description: The bounding box of the block extracted from the document.

content.title: Content
content.description: The content of the block extracted from the document.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: (Experimental) The URL of the image associated with the block.

chart_data.title: Chart Data
chart_data.description: (Experimental) The URL/link to chart data JSON for figure blocks processed by chart agent.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: The confidence for the block. It is either low or high and takes into account factors like OCR and table structure

granular_confidence.description: Granular confidence scores for the block. It is a dictionary of confidence scores for the block. The confidence scores will not be None if the user has enabled numeric confidence scores.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: Extra metadata fields for the block. Fields like 'is_chart' will only appear when set to True.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: OCR confidence score between 0 and 1, where 1 indicates highest confidence

chunk_index.title: Chunk Index
chunk_index.description: The index of the chunk that the word belongs to.

rotation.title: Rotation
rotation.description: The rotation angle in degrees, from 0 to 360, counterclockwise.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: OCR confidence score between 0 and 1, where 1 indicates highest confidence

chunk_index.title: Chunk Index
chunk_index.description: The index of the chunk that the line belongs to.

rotation.title: Rotation
rotation.description: The rotation angle in degrees, from 0 to 360, counterclockwise.

page.title: Page
page.description: The page number of the bounding box (1-indexed).

original_page.title: Original Page
original_page.description: The page number in the original document of the bounding box (1-indexed).
